name: VDM Group Limited
summary: VDM Group Limited engages in the construction business in Australia. It operates through three divisions: VDM Mining, VDM Trading, and VDM Construction. The VDM Mining division engages in the exploration, development, and operation of mining projects in Africa and Latin America. This division holds a 65% interest in the Cachoeiras do Binga copper exploration project located in the Republic of Angola. The VDM Trading division imports and exports various products, including foods and wines. The VDM Construction division provides engineering, procurement, and construction services. This division constructs residential housings covering high-rise apartments, and affordable and social housing for communities; mining accommodation facilities; modular hotel units; and student accommodation units. VDM Group Limited was founded in 1978 and is based in East Perth, Australia.
